din: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Dinka.
dis: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Dimasa.
division: noun. The act or process of dividing anything.
don: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Doura.
dos: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Dogosé.
ids: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Idesa.
ins: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Indian Sign Language.
ion: noun. An atom or group of atoms bearing an electrical charge, such as the sodium and chlorine atoms in a salt solution.
nod: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Northern Thai.
nos: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Eastern Nisu.
ons: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ono.
sod: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Songoora.
son: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-5 language code for Songhay languages.
vis: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Vishavan.
vision: noun. The sense or ability of sight.
void: adjective. Containing nothing; empty; not occupied or filled.
